title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash
description: A lighter DeepSeek-V4 serving profile that keeps the same conceptual stack while prioritizing faster deployment paths.
openingSummary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash matters because it shows the same paper can produce more than one practical model surface. It keeps the V4 architecture story, but the reader should expect a faster, smaller serving profile instead of the heaviest reasoning mode.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is the lighter member of the V4 pair. It still belongs to the same architecture and long-context family, but it is framed as the more deployment-friendly surface.

inputsAndOutputs.title: Inputs And Outputs
inputsAndOutputs.body: Like Pro, Flash is a text-in, text-out model. The distinction is operational. It aims to keep the V4 design ideas while making the serving path easier to sustain.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: The same named V4 modules remain central here: compressed sparse attention, heavily compressed attention, DeepSeekMoE routing, and changed block wiring. Flash should be read as a smaller operating point on the same overall design.

importantModules.title: Important Modules
importantModules.body: These modules carry the conceptual identity of the model family, even when the deployment target differs from Pro.

training.title: Training
training.body: The model still inherits the V4 post-training and quantization story. The difference is that Flash emphasizes a more economical runtime target.

practicalNotes.title: Practical Notes
practicalNotes.body: If Pro is the page for maximum capability under the V4 report, Flash is the page for understanding how the same design is pushed toward speed and cost control.

architectureGraph.alt: DeepSeek-V4-Flash architecture diagram with token embeddings, RoPE position encoding, a repeated decoder block containing compressed attention, RMSNorm, and DeepSeekMoE, then an output projection and softmax.

outputProbabilities.label:
Output
Probabilities
outputProbabilities.summary: The model's probability distribution over the next token

softmax.label: Softmax
softmax.summary: Turns final vocabulary scores into probabilities

linear.label:
Output
Linear
linear.summary: Projects the final hidden state into vocabulary logits

decoderStack.summary: Repeated decoder block container for the main DeepSeek-V4 stack

repeatMarker.label: N×
repeatMarker.summary: This decoder block repeats through the full stack

rmsnormAttention.label: RMSNorm
rmsnormAttention.summary: Normalizes the residual stream before the long-context attention step

compressedAttention.label:
Compressed
Attention
(CSA + HCA)
compressedAttention.summary: The attention path combines compressed sparse and heavily compressed attention for very long context

rmsnormMoe.label: RMSNorm
rmsnormMoe.summary: Normalizes the stream before the sparse expert block

deepseekmoe.label: DeepSeekMoE
deepseekmoe.summary: Routes each token through a small active set of experts instead of one dense feed-forward path

ropeInject.summary: Applies token states together with rotary position information before the stack

rope.label: RoPE
rope.summary: Rotary position encoding gives the attention stack token order information

inputEmbedding.label:
Input
Embedding
inputEmbedding.summary: Maps token IDs into hidden vectors
